jsonLd.title: Entry-Level Radiologist at PGIMER
jsonLd.description:
PGIMER, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Radiologist for our Varanasi operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About PGIMER:
PGIMER is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Collaborate with pharmaceutical representatives and medical suppliers
• Participate in quality improvement initiatives and clinical audits
• Respond to medical emergencies and provide immediate care
• Maintain accurate clinical documentation in electronic health records
• Educate patients and families on health management and disease prevention
• Conduct routine health assessments and screenings
• Ensure patient privacy and maintain confidentiality

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Medical Terminology
• Proficiency in Clinical Research
• Proficiency in Surgical Procedures
• Proficiency in CPT Codes
• Proficiency in Diagnostic Skills
• Proficiency in Medical Coding
• Proficiency in Patient Care
• Proficiency in Pharmacovigilance

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Life and accident insurance
• Flexible working hours
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Varanasi, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with PGIMER!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
